channel.title: 电力系统论文周报
channel.description: 每周自动精选电力系统运行规划、优化调度、韧性和构网稳定相关论文。

item.title: 电力系统论文周报 · 2026-06-05
item.description: 电力系统论文周报 · 2026-06-05 1. Model Predictive Black Start for Dynamic Formation of DER-Led Microgrids with Inrush Current Impacts [IEEE Transactions on Smart Grid] - 8.6/10 2. Learning-Assisted Day-Ahead Energy Scheduling for Frequency-Secure Inverter-Dominated Grids with Grid-Forming Battery Energy Storage Systems [arXiv] - 8.6/10 3. Surrogate Modeling of Interconnector Flows: A Machine Learning Alternative to Full-Scale Power System Simulations with Application to Cross-Border Electricity Exchange [arXiv] - 6.8/10 4. Detection of Unknown Attack in Cyber-Physical Power Systems via Self-Supervised Cross-Layer and Cross-Temporal Consistency [IEEE Transactions on Smart Grid] - 6.5/10 5. Distributed Quantized Control for Multiple DC Microgrids via Asymmetric Sampling under Bandwidth Constraints [IEEE Transactions on Smart Grid] - 6.5/10 6. Robust Region of Attraction for DC Microgrids under Uncertain Loading Conditions [IEEE Transactions on Smart Grid] - 6.5/10 7. Vulnerability Analysis of Multi-Timescale DC Microgrids under False Data Injection Attacks [IEEE Transactions on Smart Grid] - 6.5/10 8. Global Transient Stability Control for Grid-Following Inverter Based on Elimination of Pendulum-like Periodic Trajectory [IEEE Transactions on Sustainable Energy] - 5.7/10
